providers.prompt:
Round {{metadata.run_count}}/2.

STEP 1: Read ../bak/design/ARCHITECTURE.md.
STEP 2: Critique it for abstraction consistency, design rationale, logical gaps.
STEP 3: Write your review to review.md.
STEP 4: Output EXACTLY this JSON and NOTHING ELSE on the LAST line:
{"route":"again","content":"see review.md"}

If this is round 2 and document is acceptable, output route='stop' instead of 'again'.
Last fix (if any): {{inputs.fix}}

STEP 1: Read ../bak/design/ARCHITECTURE.md.
STEP 2: Based on this review, rewrite problematic sections.
STEP 3: Write fixes to fix.md.
STEP 4: Output EXACTLY this JSON:
{"route":"done","content":"see fix.md"}

Review:
{{inputs.review}}
